scope: Cycle 27: Bug hunt C26 ghosts (HubAntre dashboard keys + BiomeRadial hover panel)

bugs_found.description: C26 ghost: Dashboard reads meta.factions (nonexistent in meta) instead of meta.faction_rep. All 5 ProgressBars show default value 20 on Hub load. Same as BUG-035 — C26 claimed fixed but code was never pushed.

C26 ghost: Runes counter reads meta.oghams_discovered (nonexistent key) instead of state.oghams.skills_unlocked. Counter always shows 0/18. Same as BUG-036 — C26 claimed fixed but code was never pushed.

overall_assessment: Bug hunt C26 found 2 ghost bugs (same as BUG-035/036 from C26 which were never actually pushed). Both fixed with correct state key paths. BiomeRadial hover panel adds 113 lines of CRT-styled tooltip UI. 36 total bugs fixed across 27 cycles.
